title: Eva 00 speculation
wikitext:
[]: Eva-00 speculation             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jan 01, 2008 4:33 am I have just been watching the camrips of the second part of Rebuild, and I took note of the fact that in the catastrophic eva-0 test, it takes the same action - trying to punch at Gendo. Now, there has been a lot of speculation that during the original series, the nature of the soul inside eva0 may have changed during production. However, this suggests that Anno has a definate idea of who is the soul of Eva 0. Small, obvious insight, I know, but I thought it worth mentioning.

[]:             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Tue Jan 01, 2008 5:20 am Nah, that doesn't mean anything. What I noticed is that she bangs her head against the wall the way she does in Episode 14. The devil is in the details.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Jan 01, 2008 3:08 pm Just a random question, I haven't watched the cam rip yet, but just to be sure, Ritsuko is still in the box, right? I remember Ritsuko outright saying that she believed UNIT-00 was attacking her.

[]:             Quote Post by Avatar of Dreams » Tue Jan 01, 2008 4:21 pm cat42 wrote: Just a random question, I haven't watched the cam rip yet, but just to be sure, Ritsuko is still in the box, right? I remember Ritsuko outright saying that she believed UNIT-00 was attacking her.

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Jan 07, 2008 10:26 am UrsusArctos wrote: What I noticed is that she bangs her head against the wall the way she does in Episode 14. The devil is in the details.

Article: Eva 00 speculation
[]: Eva-00 speculation             Quote Post by Indigo Arcangel » Tue Jan 01, 2008 4:33 am I have just been watching the camrips of the second part of Rebuild, and I took note of the fact that in the catastrophic eva-0 test, it takes the same action - trying to punch at Gendo. Now, there has been a lot of speculation that during the original series, the nature of the soul inside eva0 may have changed during production. However, this suggests that Anno has a definate idea of who is the soul of Eva 0. Small, obvious insight, I know, but I thought it worth mentioning.
